Documentation set

  • User Guide (USER_GUIDE.md): plain-English manual for the app's end users.
  • Developer Guide (DEVELOPER_GUIDE.md): technical edition for fleet developers.
  • Executive Briefing (EXECUTIVE_BRIEFING.md): stakeholder summary (Pattern 40 skeleton).
  • Diagrams: architecture.svg and erd.svg, embedded below.
